creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Unfortunately, its not the Ports goal and practice to fix software issues when they're not FreeBSD related and especially when they are functionality enchancements and also are rejected by the upstream, so I have to reject this PR, however, try to convince the software authors to accept the patches, and then we can update the port to latest, fixed version.
Thanks for your work and apologies it took so long to act on this PR.
